basic_details.job_title: PM Shri JNV Kathlal TGT English Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: PM Shri Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Kheda Kathlal
basic_details.short_information: PM Shri Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Kheda Kathlal (PM Shri JNV Kathlal) has officially announced a Walk-in Interview for the recruitment of 1 TGT English Posts. This walk-in drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for education jobs. Candidates with Bachelor's Degree with at least 50% marks in the concerned subject/combination of subjects and also in aggregate, CTET passed, B.Ed. Degree. Competence to teach through English & Hindi. qualification can directly attend the interview on 14 July 2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: The maximum age limit for candidates is 50 years. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.details: Bachelor's Degree from a recognized university with at least 50% marks in the concerned subject/combination of subjects and also in aggregate. The candidate should have studied the requisite subjects in all three years of degree course. Passed the Central Teacher Eligibility Test (CTET), conducted by CBSE in accordance with the Guidelines framed by the NCTE, for the purpose. B.Ed. Degree. Competence to teach through English & Hindi. Experience of working in a residential school (Desirable). Knowledge of Computer application. Working knowledge of English (Desirable).

content_sections.heading: PM Shri JNV Kathlal TGT English Recruitment 2026 - Overview
PM Shri JNV Kathlal TGT English Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the PM Shri JNV Kathlal Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download PM Shri JNV Kathlal TGT English Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: PM Shri JNV Kathlal TGT English Vacancy Details 2026
PM Shri JNV Kathlal TGT English Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Bachelor's Degree from a recognized university with at least 50% marks in the concerned subject/combination of subjects and also in aggregate. The candidate should have studied the requisite subjects in all three years of degree course. Passed the Central Teacher Eligibility Test (CTET), conducted by CBSE in accordance with the Guidelines framed by the NCTE, for the purpose. B.Ed. Degree. Competence to teach through English & Hindi. Experience of working in a residential school (Desirable). Knowledge of Computer application. Working knowledge of English (Desirable).

content_sections.heading: PM Shri JNV Kathlal TGT English Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: PM Shri JNV Kathlal TGT English Age Limit 2026
content_sections.text: The maximum age limit for candidates is 50 years. Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

content_sections.heading: PM Shri JNV Kathlal TGT English Salary 2026
PM Shri JNV Kathlal TGT English Important Dates 2026
PM Shri JNV Kathlal TGT English Selection Process 2026
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for PM Shri JNV Kathlal TGT English Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: PM Shri JNV Kathlal TGT English Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the post of Trained Graduate Teacher (TGT) English on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the TGT English post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode is Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the TGT English post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 34,125/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Bachelor's Degree with at least 50% marks, CTET passed, and a B.Ed. Degree.

faq.question: Q6. What is the age limit for the TGT English post?
faq.answer: The age limit is not exceeding 50 years.

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 14th July 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the venue for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: The interview will be held at PM Shri Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalaya Kheda Kathlal, Gujarat.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates carry for the interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry original supporting documents, attested photocopies, and filled bio-data.
